name: Tomato Tuna Chowder
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over high heat, bring 2/3 cup water to boiling.
2. Stir in rice and return to boiling.
3. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender and all liquid is absorbed.
4. Meanwhile, in a 4-quart saucepan over medium heat, heat salad oil.
5. Add celery and onion, stirring occasionally, until tender.
6. Stir in rice, tomatoes with their liquid, tuna, peas, salt, sugar, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Reduce heat to high and bring to boiling.
8. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 5 minutes to cook the peas and blend flavors.
380 calories per serving.
